title: 3Pcs Masking Tape for Painting, 30mm x 50M Painters Paper Tape, Multipurpose No Paint Bleed Painting Tape for Decorating, Spraying, Construction (Orange)
features: 【No Residue Tape】Our painter's masking tape is made of advanced washi paper with good adhesion, it can be peeled off from many surfaces without leaving any residue, it can be easily peeled off without damaging the surface.

【High Visibility Design】Bright orange design provides high visibility, making the tape easier to place accurately. Masking tape can be applied to a wide range of smooth and lightly textured interior surfaces, such as wallpaper, glass, stucco walls, wood and more.
【Achieve Perfect Results】Paint Masking Tape features clear lines and no paint bleed. The tape adheres evenly, has good fit and edge locking properties, releases smoothly and leaves no residue.

【Easy to Use】Make sure the surface is clean, dry and dust-free before use, then apply the tape securely and leave it on for 30-60 minutes before applying paint. When removing, allow paint to dry, then gently pull back at a 45 degree angle to avoid damage or tape breakage.

【Wide Applications】You will receive 3 rolls of orange low-tack painters masking tape, each measuring 30mm x 50 meters, suitable for interior decorative spraying work, paint masking, drafting, tile seamstressing and packaging.
